channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Unless you reboot every once in a while, your Mac will get kicked offline every 49 days - AppleInsider
item.description:
1. Unless you reboot every once in a while, your Mac will get kicked offline every 49 days  AppleInsider
  2. Apple MacBooks Lose Network Connectivity After 49.7 Days Due to macOS "Time Bomb" Bug  TechPowerUp
  3. macOS has a 49.7-day networking time bomb built in that only a reboot fixes — comparison operation on unreliable time value stops machines dead in their tracks  Tom's Hardware
  4. 'Time bomb' in macOS shuts down TCP in MacBook after 50 days of operation  Mezha
  5. Kernel Bug: Integer Overflow in Apple's XNU Stops TCP Packets – with Long Uptime  heise online

item.title: PC Gamers Hail AAA RPG As ‘Skyrim 2’ After Epic New Freebie Drops - GAMINGbible
item.description:
1. PC Gamers Hail AAA RPG As ‘Skyrim 2’ After Epic New Freebie Drops  GAMINGbible
  2. Crimson Desert now has a detailed female character creator mod so you no longer have to play as "Temu Jon Snow"  Eurogamer
  3. Crimson Desert mod adds character creation players have been asking for, with more than 250 custom options  PC Guide
  4. A fan of Crimson Desert frees you from the generic cliff, lets you create your own protagonist who doesn't even have to be male  Mein-MMO
  5. Crimson Desert has everything except a female protagonist, so modders added one with 98 face presets and 159 hair styles: "F*** John Desert"  Yahoo Tech

item.title: Google's AI search is producing millions of wrong answers every day - TechSpot
item.description:
1. Google's AI search is producing millions of wrong answers every day  TechSpot

  3. Analysis Finds That Google's AI Overviews Are Providing Misinformation at a Scale Possibly Unprecedented in the History of Human Civilization  Futurism
  4. Google’s AI Overviews spew millions of false answers per hour, bombshell study reveals  New York Post
  5. Google's AI Summaries Are Regularly Lying to You, Report Finds  PCMag

item.title: Former GTA 6 dev issues warning about how the final game will stack up compared to trailer 3 - Dexerto
item.description:
1. Former GTA 6 dev issues warning about how the final game will stack up compared to trailer 3  Dexerto
  2. Former GTA 6 artist also "can't wait" for Trailer 3, but warns the final game won't be exactly like what you see: "That view is getting madly polished"  GamesRadar+
  3. 'The whole world doesn't look like that. You focus on the areas of the trailer' — Former Rockstar environmental artist says what fans see in GTA 6 trailers has been 'madly polished' but 'everything that's not in that view' won't be as refined yet  TechRadar
  4. Former GTA 6 developer warns trailer visuals won't match final gameplay  TweakTown
  5. Ex-Rockstar Games Artist "Can't Wait" For Grand Theft Auto VI's New Trailer, But Attempts To Set Some Expectations  PlayStation Universe
